[[ "$MIN_LINES" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then + echo "Error: min_lines must be a positive integer, got '$MIN_LINES'" + exit 1 +fi +if [ ! -d "$PROJECT_FOLDER" ]; then + echo "Error: directory does not exist: $PROJECT_FOLDER" + exit 1 +fi +case "$CONSTRUCT" in + component|function|class|hook) ;; + *) + echo "Error: unknown construct '$CONSTRUCT'. Use: component | function | class | hook" + exit 1 + ;; +esac +PROJECT_FOLDER="$(cd "$PROJECT_FOLDER" && pwd)" +TMPDIR_WORK="$(mktemp -d)" +trap 'rm -rf "$TMPDIR_WORK"' EXIT +CONSTRUCTS_FILE="$TMPDIR_WORK/constructs.tsv" +BODIES_DIR="$TMPDIR_WORK/bodies" +mkdir -p "$BODIES_DIR" +echo "Scanning $PROJECT_FOLDER for TSX $CONSTRUCT constructs (min ${MIN_LINES} lines, similarity >= ${MIN_SIMILARITY})..." +echo "" +# Extract constructs from all .tsx files using a single awk invocation per file. +# macOS awk doesn't support dynamic regex or capture groups, so we use +extract_constructs() { + local file="$1" + local rel_path="${file#"$PROJECT_FOLDER"/}" + awk -v construct_type="$CONSTRUCT" -v min_lines="$MIN_LINES" \ + -v rel="$rel_path" -v bodiesdir="$BODIES_DIR" ' + BEGIN { idx = 0; in_block = 0; depth = 0; block = ""; start = 0; name = "" } + function is_match(line) { + # component: arrow-function or function-declaration components (PascalCase returning JSX) + # Matches: export const MyComponent = ..., export default function MyComponent(, function MyComponent( + if (construct_type == "component") + return match(line, /^[[:space:]]*(export[[:space:]]+(default[[:space:]]+)?)?((const|let)[[:space:]]+[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*[=:]|function[[:space:]]+[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*[\(<])/) + # function: any named function (non-PascalCase) or arrow function assigned to lowercase var + if (construct_type == "function") + return match(line, /^[[:space:]]*(export[[:space:]]+(default[[:space:]]+)?)?((const|let|var)[[:space:]]+[a-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*(async[[:space:]]*)?\(|function[[:space:]]+[a-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*\()/) + # class: any class declaration + if (construct_type == "class") + return match(line, /^[[:space:]]*(export[[:space:]]+(default[[:space:]]+)?)?(abstract[[:space:]]+)?class[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z_]/) + # hook: custom React hooks (use* naming convention) + if (construct_type == "hook") + return match(line, /^[[:space:]]*(export[[:space:]]+(default[[:space:]]+)?)?((const|let)[[:space:]]+use[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*=|function[[:space:]]+use[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*[[:space:]]*\()/) + return 0 + } + { + if (!in_block && is_match($0)) { + in_block = 1 + depth = 0 + block = "" + start = NR + # Extract name + name = $0 + if (index(name, "class") > 0 && construct_type == "class") { + sub(/.*class[[:space:]]+/, "", name) + sub(/[^A-Za-z0-9_].*/, "", name) + } else if (construct_type == "hook") { + # Extract use* identifier (two-step: strip left of "use", then strip right) + sub(/.*[[:space:]]use/, "use", name) + sub(/[^A-Za-z0-9_].*/, "", name) + } else { + # Component or function: grab identifier after const/let/function + gsub(/export[[:space:]]+(default[[:space:]]+)?/, "", name) + if (match(name, /function[[:space:]]+/)) { + sub(/.*function[[:space:]]+/, "", name) + sub(/[^A-Za-z0-9_].*/, "", name) + } else { + sub(/^[[:space:]]*(const|let|var)[[:space:]]+/, "", name) + sub(/[^A-Za-z0-9_].*/, "", name) + } + } + } + if (in_block) { + block = block "
" $0 + n_chars = split($0, chars, "") + for (i = 1; i <= n_chars; i++) { + if (chars[i] == "{") depth++ + if (chars[i] == "}") depth-- + } + if (depth <= 0 && index(block, "{") > 0) { + lines = NR - start + 1 + if (lines >= min_lines) { + idx++ + # Use a flat filename with underscores + outname = rel + gsub(///, "__", outname) + outfile = bodiesdir "/" outname "___" idx ".txt" + print block > outfile + close(outfile) + printf "%s	%s	%d	%d	%s
", rel, name, start, NR, outfile + } + in_block = 0 + block = "" + } + } + } + ' "$file" +} +while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do + extract_constructs "$f" +done < <(find "$PROJECT_FOLDER" -name '*.tsx' \ + -not -path '*/node_modules/*' \ + -not -path '*/dist/*' \ + -not -path '*/build/*' \ + -not -path '*/.next/*' \ + -not -path '*/coverage/*' \ + -not -name '*.d.ts' \ + -not -name '*.test.tsx' \ + -not -name '*.spec.tsx' \ + -print0 | sort -z) >> "$CONSTRUCTS_FILE" +TOTAL=$(wc -l < "$CONSTRUCTS_FILE" | tr -d ' ') +if [ "$TOTAL" -eq 0 ]; then + echo "No $CONSTRUCT constructs found with >= $MIN_LINES lines." + exit 0 +fi +echo "Found $TOTAL $CONSTRUCT constructs. ", file[j], name[j], startl[j], endl[j] + printf "
" + } + } + } + if (found == 0) { + printf "No duplicate pairs found above %.0f%% similarity.
", min_sim * 100 + } else { + printf "Found %d similar pairs.

i <= length(line); i++) { + c = substr(line, i, 3) + if (c == "├" || c == "└") return i + } + return -1 +} +function get_tokens(line, s, p) { + p = match(line, /\([0-9,]+[[:space:]]+tokens\)/) + if (!p) return 0 + s = substr(line, RSTART + 1, RLENGTH - 2) + sub(/[[:space:]]+tokens/, "", s) + gsub(/,/, "", s) + return int(s) +} +{ + lines[NR] = $0 +} +END { + i = 1 + while (i <= NR) { + if (!is_file(lines[i])) { + print lines[i] + i++ + continue + } + cp = connector_pos(lines[i]) + # Collect consecutive file siblings at same connector position + n = 0 + while (i <= NR && is_file(lines[i]) && connector_pos(lines[i]) == cp) { + n++ + sib_line[n] = lines[i] + sib_tok[n] = get_tokens(lines[i]) + i++ + } + if (n > max) { + # Find top MAX_SHOWN by token count (selection via sorted indices) + for (j = 1; j <= n; j++) rank[j] = j + for (j = 1; j <= n; j++) { + for (k = j+1; k <= n; k++) { + if (sib_tok[rank[k]] > sib_tok[rank[j]]) { + tmp = rank[j]; rank[j] = rank[k]; rank[k] = tmp + } + } + } + # Mark top entries + for (j = 1; j <= n; j++) keep[j] = 0 + for (j = 1; j <= max; j++) keep[rank[j]] = 1 + # Print kept entries in original order, replacing └ with ├ + for (j = 1; j <= n; j++) { + if (keep[j]) { + line = sib_line[j] + gsub(/└── /, "├── ", line) + print line + } + } + remaining = n - max + # Build prefix from first sibling up to connector + prefix = substr(sib_line[1], 1, cp - 1) + gsub(/[├└]/, "│", prefix) + # Check if more entries follow at this level + has_more = (i <= NR && connector_pos(lines[i]) == cp) ? 1 : 0 + conn = has_more ? "├" : "└" + print prefix conn "── ... git_log_commit.message: chore(repomix): regenerate after simplify pass on llm-judge-code
style(quality-utils): collapse double blank lines to single throughout file
style(quality-utils): add missing space before ( in byValueDesc arrow function
chore: regenerate repomix docs after Round 8 simplifications
style(workflow-graph): trim 3-line WHAT comment to single WHY line on null guard
chore(repomix): regenerate (no source changes — simplify confirmed clean)
chore(repomix): regenerate after simplify round 2
chore: regenerate repomix docs after Round 7 simplifications
refactor(simplify): tighten VARIANCE_TREND_LABEL to as const; fix logAuditEvent comment
style(tests): strip CVG-1 task-tracker prefix from coverage-tab test file
chore: regenerate repomix docs after Round 6 simplifications
refactor(workflow-graph): extract buildEdgeLabel helper to eliminate duplicate label construction
style(workflow-graph): remove redundant template literal wrapping toFixed() string
style(workflow-graph): trim over-verbose comment on agentLastEndNs/agentFirstStartNs
style(workflow-graph): remove WHAT comment from NS_TO_MS constant
chore(repomix): regenerate docs after simplify pass
refactor(simplify): replace capitalize with VARIANCE_TREND_LABEL map; fix mock types and logAuditEvent nullability
perf(degradation-signals): pre-compute bucket ISO strings once before metric loop
refactor(degradation-signals): remove bucketCount alias, use DEFAULT_BIN_COUNT directly
test(coverage): add CVG-1 todo stubs for Coverage tab re-enable
refactor(worker): extract SupabaseEnv and WaitUntilFn type aliases
style(worker): remove double blank line between logActivity and VIEW_PERMISSION_MAP
fix(test): correct TEST_TIMEOUT_MS comment — applies to one test, not the suite
refactor(degradation-signals): replace duplicate precision=3 constants with SCORE_DISPLAY_PRECISION
refactor(workflow-graph): remove redundant clusterLabel field from ClusterNodeData
refactor(workflow-graph): extract CLUSTER_NODE_PREFIX and isClusterNodeId helper
perf(workflow-graph): replace O(n²) nodes.find with buildNodeDataMap lookup
chore(vite): exclude .claude/worktrees from test runner
test(degradation): add comprehensive unit tests for DegradationSignalsPage
fix(workflow-graph): store actual cluster member count in clusterMemberCount field
feat(workflow-graph): add collapsible sub-graphs for agent clusters (FU-G5-LAYOUT)
feat(degradation-signals): render coverageDropoutRate and latencySkewRatio columns
chore(backlog): mark CR-TS-1 Done
docs(backlog): record code-review findings for FU-G5-LAYOUT and R5 session
fix(type-safety): replace unsafe spanAttr<T> cast with validated type-discriminant overload (CR-TS-1)
refactor(degradation): simplify variance trend display with capitalize helper
feat(worker): add KV schema versioning envelope and audit log for admin mutations
feat(api): add /api/degradation-signals route to dev Hono server (R5)
feat(app): wire /degradation-signals route and g d shortcut (R5)
feat(pages): add DegradationSignalsPage for R5 regression detection UI
feat(hooks): add useDegradationSignals hook for R5 regression detection UI
fix(workflow): harden latencyMs guards and add coverage for positive values (FU-G5-LAYOUT)
feat(workflow): add latencyMs to WorkflowEdge and compute from span timing (FU-G5-LAYOUT)
docs(auth0): mark post-deploy checklist items complete
fix(worker): wire executionCtx.waitUntil to prevent cancelled activity logs
docs: document Auth0 integration test setup and Sentry reporter
feat(e2e): add Sentry reporter and migrate setup to Auth0 ROPC
test(e2e): purge orphaned test users before each integration run
chore: regenerate repomix docs after Round 4 simplifications
refactor(tests): strip task-tracker prefixes from test files and derive script
refactor: use RoleSchema for allowedViews; add SPAN_NAME_TOOL_PREFIX constant
chore: regenerate repomix docs after task-tracker prefix cleanup
refactor(comments): strip remaining task-tracker prefixes (WG-*, P0-*, P1-*, P2-*, ADMIN-P4-*, DR-L4)
style(theme): strip FU-G5-FILTER task-tracker reference from CSS comment
refactor(workflow): hoist containerStyle const; strip CR-STYLE-1 from theme.css
refactor(workflow-graph): replace inline height style with CSS variable
style(workflow): strip CR-PERF/CR-TS task-tracker prefixes from comments
style(admin): strip CR-AUTH-2 task-tracker prefix from comment
chore: regenerate repomix compressed XML
refactor(backtest): replace local DAY_MS constant with TIME_MS.DAY import
style: strip B6/B12/CR-ERR-4/CR-TS-5/WG-6 task-tracker prefixes from comments
fix(ci): pin all Doppler secret fetches to prd config
feat(e2e): replace localStorage session seeding with Auth0 stub
style(routes/worker): strip WG-C1 task-tracker prefixes and WHAT comments
perf(sync-to-kv): parallelize metric detail queries with Promise.all
style(judge-evaluations): remove B8/B9 task-tracker JSDoc comments
refactor(sync-to-kv): use activePeriods in remaining period loops
perf(sync-to-kv): parallelize period batch queries with Promise.all
style(sync-to-kv): remove L1/R5/N3 task-tracker prefixes from comments
fix(sync-to-kv): restore string literals in META_LAST_SYNC_KEY and META_SYNC_COVERAGE_KEY declarations
refactor(sync-to-kv): extract META_LAST_SYNC_KEY and META_SYNC_COVERAGE_KEY constants
refactor(judge-evaluations): extract JUDGE_MAX_TOKENS and JUDGE_DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE constants
perf(workflow): memoize agentNames derivation in AgentWorkflowView
style(judge-evaluations): remove task-tracker prefixes and WHAT comments from seedEvaluations/evaluateTurn
feat(workflow): add graph controls, critical path, and PNG export
refactor(derive-evaluations): extract TASK_COMPLETION_EVAL_NAME; use TOOL_CORRECTNESS_CRITERIA.name
refactor(judge-evaluations): use TOOL_CORRECTNESS_CRITERIA.name; simplify subCriteria to drop redundant name field
refactor(judge-evaluations): extract RELEVANCE/COHERENCE/FAITHFULNESS/HALLUCINATION_EVAL_NAME constants; replace 20 raw strings
refactor(judge-evaluations): replace raw evaluator type strings at evalType filter and dataset run record
perf(derive-evaluations): store distinctAgentCount instead of full Set in handoff loop
refactor(judge-evaluations): extract TRACE_BACKFILL_EVALUATOR_TYPE; replace raw strings at backfill override
refactor(sync-to-kv): remove unnecessary Record<string,unknown> cast in filterCanary
refactor(sync-to-kv): replace raw 'canary' string with CANARY_EVALUATOR_TYPE constant
refactor(derive-evaluations): hoist sessionPreview in agent/handoff completion loops
refactor(scripts): extract RULE_EVALUATOR_TYPE constant; replace 6 raw 'rule' literals
refactor(scripts): add CANARY/SEED_EVALUATOR_TYPE constants; hoist sessionPreview
fix(judge-evaluations): correct self-referential sessionPreview; add declaration to evaluateTurn
refactor(scripts): apply RULE_EVALUATOR/LLM_EVALUATOR_TYPE constants; hoist sessionPreview
refactor(scripts): extract LLM_JUDGE_EVALUATOR constant; remove blank line
perf(workflow): memoize effectiveSelected Set and document style exemption
refactor(derive-evaluations): remove write-only vars; hoist RULE_EVALUATOR to module level
refactor(derive-evaluations): remove redundant existsSync guard before readJsonlWithValidationSync
style(derive-evaluations): split multi-declaration into separate let statements
feat(workflow): add agent filter chip bar to AgentWorkflowView (FU-G5-FILTER)
perf(derive-evaluations): eliminate handoffScores array; compute in single pass
fix(derive-evaluations): remove stray double semicolon
refactor(derive-evaluations): use STATUS_SCORES constants instead of magic score literals
refactor(derive-evaluations): use shared constants and toDateOnly utility
refactor(judge-evaluations): remove redundant streaming WHAT comments
refactor(judge-evaluations): remove WHAT inline comments

repomix.instruction:
# Quality Metrics Dashboard
React 19 + Vite 8 dashboard with Hono API, backed by a Cloudflare Worker. Displays 7 quality metrics derived from Claude Code session telemetry. Auth: Auth0 Universal Login with role-based access control backed by Supabase DB.
## Commands
```bash npm run dev # Vite + Hono API on :3001 npm test # Vitest npm run typecheck # tsc --noEmit npm run build # Production build npm run populate -- --seed # Data pipeline (offline) npm run deploy:worker # Deploy Cloudflare Worker doppler run --project integrity-studio --config dev -- npm run test:e2e:integration # Auth0 integration tests ```
## Architecture
- **Frontend**: `src/` — React 19 + Vite 8, React Router, Auth0 React SDK (`@auth0/auth0-react`) - **API server**: `src/api/` — Hono server on :3001, reads from Cloudflare KV via worker - **Worker**: `worker/index.ts` — Auth0 JWKS JWT verification via `jose`, KV read-through cache, protected `/api/*` routes - **Auth**: Auth0 Universal Login + role-based permissions from Supabase `user_roles -> roles.permissions` (all DB access via service role key). See [docs/auth/user-authentication.md](docs/auth/user-authentication.md) - **Validation**: Zod schemas in `src/lib/validation/` for all auth and dashboard types - **Styling**: No inline styles — use CSS classes defined in `src/theme.css` or component-level selectors. Never pass `style={{...}}` props. - **React Compiler**: Active via `babel-plugin-react-compiler`. Libraries incompatible with it (e.g., `useReactTable`) require `// eslint-disable-next-line react-compiler/react-compiler` suppression with a comment explaining why.
## Constants Architecture
Two constants files with a hard module boundary — do not cross-import: - **`src/lib/constants.ts`** — frontend + API server shared; uses `import.meta.env` (Vite). Imported by React components, hooks, and Hono API routes. - **`src/api/api-constants.ts`** — API server only (Node context). Imported by `src/api/routes/` and `scripts/`. Cannot be imported in Vite-rendered code. - **`worker/index.ts`** — has its own local `Http` constants object; cannot import either file above safely.
Score display precision constants (use these, never raw `.toFixed()` literals): - `SCORE_CHIP_PRECISION = 2` — compact chips/cells - `SCORE_DISPLAY_PRECISION = 3` — standard display - `SCORE_FORMAT_PRECISION = 4` — raw value formatting
## Data Pipeline (`scripts/`)
`npm run populate` runs: derive → judge → sync-to-kv
- `derive-evaluations.ts` — rule-based metrics (tool_correctness, evaluation_latency, task_completion) - `judge-evaluations.ts` — LLM-based metrics (relevance, coherence, faithfulness, hallucination) - `sync-to-kv.ts` — delta sync aggregates to Cloudflare KV (priority: meta/agent > metrics > trends > traces)
Requires parent `dist/` — run `npm run build` in observability-toolkit first.
## Integration Tests (`e2e/integration/`)
Run against the deployed worker with a real Auth0 JWT. Requires Doppler dev config.
- **Setup** (`setup.ts`): acquires Auth0 JWT via ROPC (`VITE_AUTH0_DOMAIN`, `VITE_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID`, `AUTH0_TEST_EMAIL/PASSWORD`), upserts `public.users`, assigns `e2e-dashboard-reader` role - **Teardown** (`teardown.ts`): removes `user_roles`, `user_activity`, `public.users` row — Auth0 user is permanent, never deleted - **Sentry** (`sentry-reporter.ts`): captures `failed`/`timedOut` tests to Sentry (`SENTRY_DSN` from Doppler); no-ops if unset - Auth0 tenant: `dev-68gg87ow4mg4kzyo.us.auth0.com`, `password` grant enabled on `integritystudio-dashboard` SPA (`CNfd6xPPr2aLmvNyiearhmaLknAYvtnq`); default directory set to `Username-Password-Authentication`
## Deployment
Two Cloudflare Workers serve the dashboard API (same KV namespace): - `quality-metrics-api` — production - `obs-toolkit-quality-metrics-api` — wrangler.toml default
Deploy both after worker changes: ```bash npx wrangler deploy npx wrangler deploy --name quality-metrics-api ```
